assertions.title: Lane 01 packet carries release-gate, rollback, operator/frontend handoff, and frontend v2 doc evidence

steps.action: Review the Lane 01 release-review and release-gate packet artifacts
steps.expected: The packet should name the packet commits, release roles, rollback order, and the explicit stop-at-orchestrator rule before Lane 02 can consume the lane
steps.observed: The packet files `docs/code-review/executable-specs/01-lane-control-plane-runtime/01-lane01-release-review.md` and `01-lane01-release-gate.md` both identify commits `ddf28d7b` and `13cfee89`, name the reviewer/QA/release approver roles, record rollback order and RTO/RPO notes, and explicitly state that Lane 02 remains blocked until orchestrator base-branch review accepts Lane 01.

steps.action: Cross-check operator/frontend handoff references and the frontend-update-v2 tracker entries cited by the packet
steps.expected: The release-gate should point to concrete handoff references and either updated frontend tracker entries or an explicit no-op note for the surviving control-plane surfaces
steps.observed: The release-review caller map and release-gate both reference `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md`, `docs/frontend-update-v2/README.md`, `docs/frontend-update-v2/global-security-settings-authorization.md`, `docs/frontend-update-v2/lane01-align-lifecycle-and-runtime-truth.md`, and `docs/frontend-update-v2/lane01-release-gate-and-handoff.md`. Those files explicitly record that tenant-admin global-settings mutation stays blocked, tenant-runtime metrics remain the read surface, suspended tenants keep protected auth reads while writes stay denied, and the release-governance packet itself introduces no new request/response shape delta.

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session packet and handoff validation as instructed by the mission guidance.

summary: Validated the Lane 01 governance/documentation assertion directly in-session after delegated helper launch failed. The release-review and release-gate artifacts name the exact packet commits, roles, rollback plan, and stop rule before Lane 02, and they point to explicit frontend/operator handoff references plus the required frontend-update-v2 tracker entries.
